summary: Escoffiers Global Solutions website - hospitality and recruitment services site with multi-page navigation, branding, and employer login
architectural_notes: Multi-page website with Home, About, Services, Recruitment, and Contact pages
Escoffiers branding with green/orange color scheme
Service cards for Recruitment, Consulting, and Hospitality Services
known_issues: Previous deployment showed ICP default template instead of actual site
DNS propagation to www.escoffiers.com may take 24-48 hours after Hostinger records update
Browser caching may show old content even after successful deployment

existing_features.title: Restore complete Escoffiers Global Solutions branding and content across all pages, ensuring no default Internet Computer template elements remain

Maintain all existing page content including company history since 2013, service offerings (restaurant consulting, kitchen design, recruitment), mission, vision, and gallery showcasing project categories

new_feature_requests.summary: Ensure backend actor initializes correctly with user profile management and contact inquiry system with role-based access control
Verify all existing features are functional: contact form submission, employer login with Internet Identity, admin inquiries dashboard, and multi-page navigation
